candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A physics student is analyzing the motion of a cart using video analysis. A low-friction lab cart is initially rolling on a long track, while a camera is taking pictures of the cart with a frame rate of 30 frames per second. The following dots show the location of the front of the cart in each picture during the entire time the cart travels 2 m on the track. Show calculation(s) to estimate the velocity of the cart at the end of the second track.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.explanation_zh:
在倾斜部分的顶端,初始速度已经计算为4米/秒。为了确定时间,我们将时间分为10个间隔,每个间隔为1/30秒,因此在第2段轨道上的时间为1/3秒。假设加速度是均匀的,我们可以得到如下速度-时间图:https://img.apstudy.net/ap/physics-1/a500/Answer_065.jpg。速度-时间图下的面积就是位移,对于这一部分,位移为2米。使用梯形面积公式,我们可以计算出最终速度:

\begin{align*}
梯形面积 &= \frac{底_1 + 底_2}{2} \times 高 \\
位移 &= \frac{(v_i + v_f)}{2} \times 时间 \\
2\, 米 &= \frac{\left( \frac{4\, \frac{米}{秒} + v_f}{2} \right) \left( \frac{1}{3}\, 秒 \right)} \\
v_f &= 8\, 米/秒
\end{align*}

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The task is understandable: use the motion-dot image and the 30 fps rate to estimate the cart's final velocity over a 2 m track. The dot sequence from Frame 1 to Frame 16 is visible enough to support the problem. There is a small wording glitch in 'end of the second track,' but the intended meaning is still recoverable.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
